criteria_source: workflow contract hard gates plus gpt-5.5|xhigh baseline comparison

hard_gates.description: Output includes capture scope, inventory, normalized entries, project/P00 ledgers, Soulforge subledger ledgers, skipped register, review-needed register, receipt, handoff, boundary note, and completion state.
M1 routes to the declared P01-SYNTH project ledger.
M2 routes to P00-000_INBOX as company general or unresolved company work, not Soulforge system or personal work.
M3 routes to workflow and M4 routes to automation under _workmeta/system/daily_ledger/<subledger>.
M5 and M7 go to review_needed without inferring unapproved project codes or subledger ids.
M6 goes to skipped_source_register because raw mail body placeholders are not approved metadata sources.
M8 is flagged as duplicate review-needed rather than silently merged into M1.
Candidate uses metadata refs and summary labels only, with no copied body text, raw payloads, local absolute paths, secrets, attachments, Office/PDF/HWP payloads, or real work logs.
Candidate states this is a synthetic preview with no real ledger writes or real run.
Candidate keeps the claim ceiling at observed metadata, not source truth, owner acceptance, pilot execution, or production readiness.

failure_conditions: routes M2 to Soulforge or personal/system work instead of P00
routes unknown project code or unknown subledger without review_needed
normalizes raw payload source M6 into a ledger entry
silently merges duplicate M8 into M1 without review-needed evidence
copies source body text, mail body, attachment payload, Office/PDF/HWP payload, secret, local absolute path, or real work log content
claims real ledger files were written or a real capture run occurred
claims source truth, owner acceptance, pilot execution, production readiness, or default-route change
quality_equivalence_rule: A candidate may pass with different JSON layout or wording if every hard gate is met, no critical boundary condition is lost, and the output is directly usable as a synthetic daily ledger capture preview packet.
